clean_content:
Learn Legal Conceptswith Expert Guides & AI Assistance


Explore expertly written legal resources covering company registration, trademarks, GST, compliance, contracts, and startup law. Every article can later be searched through the LexAssist AI Legal Assistant.


Complete Company Registration Guide


A step-by-step guide to Private Limited registration, DSC setups, and founder equity allocation rules.


Private Limited vs LLP: Which is Best?


A detailed comparison of equity structures, compliance costs, and audit rules for startups.


Trademark Registration Process Explained


Learn how to run searches, select classes, and file applications to secure your brand identity.


GST Registration Checklist for Small Businesses


Filing rules, threshold limits, and required address proof documents for tax compliance.


SaaS Startup Legal Checklist


Essential compliance rules, vesting schedules, and contract templates before raising capital.


Annual ROC Compliance Calendar


Keep track of annual filings, ROC audit timelines, and board resolution meetings.


How to Draft a Legal Contract for Services


Fulfill Master Service Agreements, NDAs, and liability caps to safeguard business operations.


Employment Agreement Guide for Tech Teams


Drafting employee vesting terms, IP assignments, and non-solicitation guidelines.


Legal Resource Collections



Starting a Business


Private Limited setup, partnership agreements, and founder equity allocation.


Trademark Essentials


Secure brand logotypes and manage trademark class conflicts.


Business Compliance


ROC filing rules, audit calendars, and director obligations.


Filing Checklists & Templates



Ask Questions About Any Legal Article


Instead of searching manually, simply ask our AI Legal Assistant. It understands every article in our Legal Knowledge Center and provides contextual answers with source attribution.


Ready to Solve Your Legal Questions?

Subscribe to our newsletter for bi-weekly legal compliance guide updates, AI regulations reports, and risk management tips.
